reason: Successfully navigated to agent QA-20260404-020649-nbhl, verified its status as idle, sent a message asking "Hello! What is 2+2?", and received the correct response containing "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents including the target agent.
Located and clicked agent "QA-20260404-020649-nbhl" in the sidebar - Successfully navigated to the agent detail page with the agent landing view displayed.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Status confirmed as "idle" (meets requirement).
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field - Message successfully entered in the input field with testid "landing-message-input".
Clicked the send button - Message sent successfully, agent status transitioned to "working", and a new session "Basic Math Question with QA-20260404" was created.
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response - Agent completed processing in 2 seconds and returned the response "4".

Verified response mentions "4" and took final screenshot - Response clearly displays "4" with "Worked for 2s" indicator, confirming the agent correctly answered the math question. Screenshot saved as step6-final-response.png showing the complete conversation.
